report_safe_claim: FAMS was systematically checked under documented settings but failed the visual promotion gate for egocentric imagery and could not reproduce its author sample with the obtainable checkpoint.
chronology_note: Earlier development evidence was followed by author-recipe and author-sample controls. Persistent visual corruption stopped progression to the locked 500-frame protocol.

limitation: The participant-grouped artifact gate recalled 11/14 reviewed artifacts and missed three; broader visual review also found pose/gaze failures outside the grouped artifact definition. It is retained as a measured policy ablation, not the runtime default.
report_safe_claim: The RiDDLE-heavy policy materialised 500 outputs and improved the declared numerical score, but was superseded after the uniform visual-quality gate.
chronology_note: Measured 500-output generative-policy ablation; superseded as runtime default by the visual-safe deterministic policy.

limitation: The policy is objective-specific and uses deterministic outputs already validated on the locked protocol; it does not establish universal superiority or naturalistic face synthesis.

chronology_note: Current runtime default after uniform visual-quality investigation superseded the RiDDLE-heavy generative-policy ablation.
